title: Generating Correctly Formatted JSON Schema Definitions for Complex Nested Objects
scenario: Develop a system to generate JSON schema definitions for complex nested objects with varying levels of nesting and data types. The system should output the JSON schema in YAML format and handle edge cases such as missing or invalid data. Consider using a recursive approach to handle nested objects.
constraints: Must use a recursive approach to handle nested objects

evaluationCriteria.description: The output JSON schema should accurately represent the complex nested object.
The recursive approach should be correctly implemented to handle nested objects.
The system should handle edge cases such as missing or invalid data correctly.
The output YAML should conform to standard YAML formatting guidelines.
